ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange on which the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Name of the firm employing the analyst */,
  "reputation" REAL /* Reputation score of the analyst (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the analyst */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken (e.g., Maintain, Upgrade, Downgrade) */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target set by the analyst */,
  "upside_downside" REAL /* Upside/downside potential of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical rating */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being stored */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action taken (e.g., Maintain, Upgrade, Downgrade) */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target set by the analyst */,
  "upside_downside" REAL /* Upside/downside potential of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_rating_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_type_id") REFERENCES rating_types ("rating_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the exchange */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_types" (
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the analyst (e.g., Maintain, Upgrade, Downgrade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-exchange relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock listed on the exchange */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange on which the stock is listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Listing date of the stock on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_stock" (
  "analyst_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst-stock relationship */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing ratings for the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of coverage by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_stock_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_stock_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the rating or stock */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating or stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating or stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the stock */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst making the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price of the stock */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the prediction (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
